benchmarks.label: Committee for a Responsible Federal Budget
PolicyEngine prior single-year score
benchmarks.note: $98.9B for 2025; NOT directly comparable to the 2026 figure (different year, dataset version).

policyengine_2026.note: PolicyEngine's own computed single-year 2026 revenue change (from impact.json).

methodology_note: Static microsimulation (no behavioral response) on the certified PolicyEngine bundle dataset, computed server-side by the hosted PolicyEngine v1 API — the same engine that powers policyengine.org. All budgetary figures are SINGLE-YEAR 2026; do not extrapolate a naive x10 for a ten-year total.

calibration.source_citation: ssa | SSA Annual Statistical Supplement 2025 extracted OASDI and SSI target rows | ssa_oasdi_ssi_2024.csv | annual_statistical_supplement_2025 | https://www.ssa.gov/policy/docs/statcomps/supplement/2025/index.html
